title: stachys riederi var. villosa
intro: Stachys riederi var. villosa, also known as the hairy alpine betony or woolly alpine betony, is a plant species within the mint family that is native to the European Alps. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a valuable remedy for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Stachys riederi var. villosa include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and possibly alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in topical applications to take advantage of its antiseptic properties.
